description:
The Ministry of Health requires all diagnoses to be mapped to ICD-10 codes. You need to add a missing code to the system dictionary by creating a new Concept Reference Term in the OpenMRS Administration interface (https://localhost/openmrs/admin). Use the following details: Concept Source 'ICD-10-WHO', Code 'A00', Name 'Cholera', and Description 'Acute diarrhoeal infection caused by ingestion of food or water contaminated with the bacterium Vibrio cholerae'. 

Credentials:
Username: superman
Password: Admin123
